name: Arizer Solo 3 XL Adapter 14mm
summary: Introducing the Arizer Solo 3 XL Adapter 14mm, designed to enhance herbal capacity and airflow for the optimal vaping experience.
description: Introducing the Arizer Solo 3 XL Adapter 14mm, designed to enhance herbal capacity and airflow for the optimal vaping experience. Boasting a 2-in-1 glass pod and mouthpiece, as well as a male glass-to-glass connector, this adapter is both convenient and effortless to maintain. Additionally, the innovative Pre-Load feature guarantees precise dosing. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
